reviews.content: Easy grade and OK course overall. Depends on your interests though cuz it's kinda niche
LONG LIVE FADIL. OK intro to programming but probably better next year with python instead of java
tags: Professor & TAs are Accessible Outside Class

reviews.content: paris is such a good professor but the other ones ruined the course. it’s also one of the few courses that are modern enough to encourage using ai for studying. i enjoyed it

grading was tough as HELL. but it was actually a very good course in retrospect and i learned a lot. marco is super nice also. best tip i have is use gemini through ai.studio for reading docs!! dont even bother opening those 200 page pdfs
great professor he was super nice and helpful and even provided extra material for those who wanted it. also nice hands-on labs with circuit boards in the course. recommend!
tags: Professor & TAs are Accessible Outside Class
